name: Cream of Shrimp Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add carrots, onion, celery, and potato; sauté until the onion is translucent (2-3 minutes).
3. Stir in white wine, water, heavy cream, thyme, bay leaf, and most of the shrimp. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently for 20 minutes.
5. In small batches, purée the soup in a food processor.
6. Return puréed soup to the pan and season with salt, pepper, hot sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Add remaining shrimp, chopped into small chunks; cook until heated through (2-3 minutes).
8. Garnish with parsley before serving.
